response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and diverse project leadership experience, but lacks explicit evidence of IT architecture design, UML expertise, and German proficiency (only 'Basic'), which are critical for this executive-level role in a German-speaking consulting environment.
strengths: Extensive open-source leadership with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
Proven full-stack engineering across multiple languages and domains including Linux, Docker, and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong track record of mentoring and teaching via workshops, code katas, and course development
concerns: German language proficiency listed as 'Basic' — falls far short of required C1 level
No clear evidence of UML, formal architecture modeling, or requirements management in resume
Lacks documented experience in client-facing technical advisory or IT security/compliance leadership
